nodes.name: Dusky-headed brushfinch
nodes.summary: Dusky-headed brushfinch（Atlapetes fuscoolivaceus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Dusky-headed brushfinch。

nodes.name: Dusky-headed brushfinch
nodes.summary: The dusky-headed brushfinch (Atlapetes fuscoolivaceus) is a species of bird in the family Emberizidae. It is found in the Andes of southwestern Colombia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests and heavily degraded former forest. It is becoming rare due to habitat loss. References
